text: U.S. coach Pochettino pleased with 'fantastic' Pepi, Balogun pairing - ESPN
fullText: United States manager Mauricio Pochettino praised his side's tactical flexibility in defeating Australia 2-0 at Lumen Field on Friday, saying they were "fantastic" in clinching a spot in the knockout rounds of the World Cup.

text: Italy's Meloni, once Trump's closest ally in Europe, says he made up a story about her - NPR
fullText: "Italy and I do not beg," Meloni said in a video rebuke posted on social media Friday. Italy's top diplomat, meanwhile, said he was cancelling a visit to the U.S because of the alleged remarks.

text: The Sun may not engulf Earth after all, scientists say - Phys.org
fullText: Need some good news on a Friday after a long week? The Earth may not be engulfed by the expanding fireball of the dying sun, which has long been assumed to be our home planet's ultimate fate, according to scientists.

text: Unpatchable 'usbliter8' Exploit Breaks Apple A12 and A13 SecureROM Boot Chain - The Hacker News
